title: OSDUE Makeup Mirror, 2X Magnifying PU Leather Compact Double Sided Portable Folding Pocket Travel Handheld Mirror
features: 【High-quality materials】Made of high-grade textured PU leather and high-definition glass, carefully polished and perfectly polished; with foldable hinges, it can be opened 180 degrees to lay flat or hold at any angle you want, elegant and sturdy, compact and lightweight.

【Easy Used】Open 180 degrees, easy to take the mirror. Firm at every angle. You can experience it like a small easel, put the mirror on the desk, table or dressing table at will, so that you can 100% free your hands.

【Double-sided Folding Magnifying Mirror】Our classic double-sided folding mirror makes your makeup easier and better, one side of the regular mirror provides a clear real image, and the other side of the 2X magnifying mirror allows you to see small details, but also with ultra-high clarity. (Leather mirror)
【Small and Convenient】This mini makeup mirror is easy to carry and can be put in a handbag, pocket or purse, perfect for going out, traveling, camping and other occasions.

【Perfect Gift for Women】This portable handheld folding mirror is a great gift choice. You can give this travel makeup mirror as a gift to your family, friends and lovers on birthdays, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Christmas, anniversaries, Halloween, Thanksgiving and other special days.
description: Product description Features: Technical specifications: (Leather mirror) Material: ABS + Glass + PU leather Specifications: 61*95mm (square) Specifications: 8*8cm (round) (Glossy mirror) Material: ABS + Glass Specifications: 10*10*cm Small and portable, can be carried around Note: Due to manual measurement, there may be a certain size error; Due to the shooting environment, there may be a certain color difference; Safety Warning Handle gently to avoid injury. Do not drop or expose to extreme temperatures. Keep out of reach of children.
